content.en:
"You can go to transcendence, although Shizun helped me cover the realm, even the ancestral monument can't know my strength, but it is impossible to help me cover it all the time, break through as soon as possible!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he announced that he was about to detach.

this day.

Outside the Void Heaven Temple.

Ye Tian began to detach, the so-called detachment is to take out the soul imprint from the long river of time and space, so that the soul imprint can be separated from the long river of time and space, and out of the control of the universe.

This is the real detachment and freedom.

The origin of the great universe is very powerful, and it is very difficult to transcend the long river of time and space of the great universe, but Ye Tiannai is a ten-star god general, even a nine-star god general can transcend the great universe.

Therefore, no one thought that Ye Tian would fail to transcend.

One after another, the figures of Heavenly Monarchs appeared near this void, watching Ye Tian detach.

The Heavenly Monarchs of the Void Heaven Hall are responsible for security, and if the Celestial Monarch gets too close, they will be blocked by the Void Heaven Temple.

They didn't want someone to make trouble when Ye Tian was detached.

After adjusting his state, Ye Tian began to detach.

I saw that Ye Tian sensed the soul imprint in the long river of time and space, and with Ye Tian's power surging, the long river of time and space appeared.

In an instant, a golden light flashed from the long river of time and space, it was Ye Tian's soul mark.

Then, Ye Tian's soul imprint turned into a giant, ignoring the waves of time and space in the long river of time and space, pushing everything sideways and walking out.

The void ripples, and the avenue shook.

Ye Tian's detached vision permeated the infinite territory, far surpassing the detached vision of others.

Rumble!!!!

The soul imprint walked out of the long river of time and space, and perfectly fused with Ye Tian's soul.

At this moment, Ye Tian's soul was truly complete.

In an instant, Ye Tian's aura became stronger and stronger, and infinite vitality surged, washing Ye Tian's body.

Click!!

The sound of shattering sounded in the dark, representing that Ye Tian had broken the shackles of the Earth Venerable and the Heavenly Mandate Realm.

The combat power of the ten-star god general still belongs to the earth venerable, and Ye Tian was still in the earth venerable consummation realm before, but the combat power has reached the ten-star god general, but at this time, the cultivation has reached the half-step heavenly mandate realm.

If you want to truly reach the realm of Heavenly Destiny, you want to complete the transformation of the physical body and transform into a chaotic life.

And before, Ye Tian's body was only fifty percent transformed into chaotic life, which belonged to semi-chaotic life, but now the shackles of the physical body are gone, as long as there is a pure, powerful and massive chaotic vitality, it can be transformed into chaotic life.

Before.

A god will be detached, can leave the universe and enter chaos, use the infinite chaotic vitality in the chaos to transform into chaotic life, and advance to the realm of destiny.

But if you leave the universe, it will be difficult to come back.

If Ye Tian leaves the Great Universe now, although there is still a way to come back, the price he will pay will be great.

Moreover, the Void Heaven Hall also had a cultivation secret room specially prepared for the impact of the Heavenly Destiny Realm, so Ye Tian did not need to leave the Great Universe.

However, before Ye Tian really wanted to impact the Heavenly Mandate Realm, he still needed to survive the tribulation of transcendence.

Thundered!!!!

In the endless void, thunder clouds formed.

One thunder tribulation after another bombarded Ye Tian's body, each thunder tribulation was extremely powerful, and each thunder tribulation behind could even easily kill an ordinary eight-star god general.

The last thunder tribulation can even kill an eight-star peak god general, and only a nine-star early stage god general can easily survive such a transcendent tribulation, or an eight-star peak god general who is relatively powerful to save his life, then he can also survive such a thunder tribulation.

After the thunder tribulation was completed, Ye Tian was truly detached.

"Everyone, I just broke through, and I need to go back to retreat to stabilize the realm and complete the real breakthrough of the Heavenly Mandate realm, so I won't accompany you!"

After Ye Tian finished speaking, he left.

Subsequently, the news of Ye Tian's detachment spread, and countless forces in the entire universe were discussing Ye Tian.

......

Cultivation Secret Room.

Ye Tian continued to transform his body with the help of the pure Chaos Vitality here, and the original fifty percent chaotic lifeforms were slowly transformed into ten percent chaotic lifeforms, and they were powerful chaotic lifeforms with Void Heaven Dao bodies and ninth-order lifeforms.

At the same time, the divine power in Ye Tian's body was also transformed into chaotic divine power, and the small universe in his body also became more like a universe, and even life was born in it, and it began to evolve again and again.

When a life breaks through from the Earth Venerable to the Heavenly Mandate Realm, it will usher in a great explosion of cultivation, and in a period of time, the cultivation speed will be very fast.

For example, some seven- or eight-star god generals, once they break through to the realm of the Mandate of Heaven, they will directly break through to the middle stage of the Mandate of Heaven in a short period of time, and they do not need to accumulate for a long time.

Otherwise, it will take a long time to break through from the early stage of the Mandate of Heaven to the middle of the Mandate of Heaven, and if there are not enough resources, it will even take billions of years.

And Ye Tian also felt the rapid growth of his cultivation speed, and the endless chaotic vitality poured into his body, which he easily refined into his own chaotic divine power.

The body and chaotic divine power are skyrocketing every day.

In addition, the prototype of Ye Tian's Great Dao also began to grow.

Previously, the prototype of Ye Tian's Avenue was 1,000 meters long and 10,800 meters wide, after all, it was the prototype of an endless avenue condensed by 108 avenues, and it was naturally not comparable to other avenues.

The kilometer avenue is considered an entry, the 10,000-meter avenue is considered a small success, the 50,000-meter avenue is considered a large achievement, and the completion avenue is 100,000 meters.

Once the avenue is condensed to 100,000 meters long, it is at the end, and it can be regarded as a truly successful condensation of a avenue, once it really condenses the avenue of 100,000 meters, it is equivalent to stepping into the realm of true ancestors.

As for how to improve after reaching the realm of True Ancestor, Ye Tian didn't think much about it, because he was still too far away from True Ancestor.

"The prototype of the Great Dao is not in a hurry to improve, I need to try to comprehend those chaotic supernatural powers at present, the previous chaotic supernatural powers are only a prototype, and now I only need to re-comprehend them, I can obtain a door entry-level chaotic supernatural powers, and my strength can be improved a lot!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he began to comprehend the Chaos Divine Powers, and in just a few years, he had all the Chaos Divine Powers introduced.

Next, Ye Tian wholeheartedly promoted his cultivation.

In the blink of an eye, thousands of years have passed.

On this day, Ye Tian was out of the customs, and his cultivation suddenly reached the realm of the late stage of the Mandate of Heaven, and his strength was many times stronger than in the past.

It is also in the Heavenly Mandate Realm, but Ye Tian's physical strength and chaotic divine power far surpass others, after all, Ye Tian's foundation is too strong.

However, Ye Tian's strength was not enough to make it to the Heavenly Monarch List, as he was still weak in many aspects.

For example, the eighth and ninth layers of the Xuanxuan Jue have not yet begun to cultivate, the Chaos Divine Powers have only just started, many secret techniques are outdated, and they can't keep up with the current strength, and the prototype of the Great Dao is still relatively weak, etc.

But as long as Ye Tian is given time, he can quickly rise up, and it won't even be long before he can ascend to the Heavenly Monarch List.
